case_title: DEL ROSARIO, CATALINA Z. VS ORIG, ANGELICA B. C/O DEPT OF HUMAN AGENCY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PYMTS TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150 EVERY 2 WKS BEG. ON 2/22/05 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PYMT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
CHANGE OF ADDRESS SUBMITTED BY DEFT IN COURT. NEW ADDRESS IS: 1230 MARKET ST. #660. SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL ROSARIO, CATALINA Z. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORIG, ANGELICA B. C/O DEPT OF HUMAN AGENCY $4,580.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,612.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
